description: arXiv:2606.19387v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in software development. However, they are susceptible to hallucinations, meaning that they can introduce subtle semantic and logical errors. Due to the high stakes in chip design and manufacturing, hardware engineers are still reluctant to rely on LLMs for register-transfer l...
author: You Li, Samuel Mandell, David Z. Pan
